mapper.select: SELECT mp.PRODUCT_ID, mp.USER_NO, mp.TITLE, mp.IMAGE_NO, mp.NAME, mp.DETAIL, mp.PRICE, mp.QUANTITY, mp.CREATED_AT, mp.DEADLINE, mp.PHONE, mp.ACCOUNT_NO, mp.VIEWS, mp.DELETE_STATUS, u.USERNAME AS AUTHOR, u.SIK_BTI AS SIK_BTI, CONCAT('/images/', ui.SERVER_NAME) AS AUTHOR_PROFILE_URL, CONCAT('/images/', pi.SERVER_NAME) AS IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES l WHERE l.REF_NO = mp.PRODUCT_ID AND l.REF_TYPE = 'MARKET' AND l.LIKE_STATUS = 'Y') AS LIKES FROM MARKETPLACE mp JOIN USERS u ON mp.USER_NO = u.USER_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE ui ON u.IMAGE_NO = ui.IMAGE_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE pi ON mp.IMAGE_NO = pi.IMAGE_NO WHERE mp.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT mp.PRODUCT_ID, mp.TITLE, mp.CREATED_AT, mp.VIEWS, u.USERNAME AS AUTHOR, u.SIK_BTI AS SIK_BTI, CONCAT('/images/', ui.SERVER_NAME) AS AUTHOR_PROFILE_URL, CONCAT('/images/', pi.SERVER_NAME) AS IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES l WHERE l.REF_NO = mp.PRODUCT_ID AND l.REF_TYPE = 'MARKET' AND l.LIKE_STATUS = 'Y') AS LIKES FROM MARKETPLACE mp JOIN USERS u ON mp.USER_NO = u.USER_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE ui ON u.IMAGE_NO = ui.IMAGE_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE pi ON mp.IMAGE_NO = pi.IMAGE_NO WHERE mp.DELETE_STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY mp.CREATED_AT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 12

SELECT mp.PRODUCT_ID, mp.TITLE, mp.CREATED_AT, mp.VIEWS, u.USERNAME AS AUTHOR, u.SIK_BTI AS SIK_BTI, CONCAT('/images/', ui.SERVER_NAME) AS AUTHOR_PROFILE_URL, CONCAT('/images/', pi.SERVER_NAME) AS IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES l WHERE l.REF_NO = mp.PRODUCT_ID AND l.REF_TYPE = 'MARKET' AND l.LIKE_STATUS = 'Y') AS LIKES FROM MARKETPLACE mp JOIN USERS u ON mp.USER_NO = u.USER_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE ui ON u.IMAGE_NO = ui.IMAGE_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE pi ON mp.IMAGE_NO = pi.IMAGE_NO WHERE mp.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND mp.DELETE_STATUS = 'N' ORDER BY mp.CREATED_AT DESC

SELECT mp.PRODUCT_ID, mp.USER_NO, mp.TITLE, mp.IMAGE_NO, mp.NAME, mp.DETAIL, mp.PRICE, mp.QUANTITY, mp.CREATED_AT, mp.DEADLINE, mp.PHONE, mp.ACCOUNT_NO, mp.VIEWS, mp.DELETE_STATUS, u.USERNAME AS AUTHOR, u.SIK_BTI AS SIK_BTI, CONCAT('/images/', ui.SERVER_NAME) AS AUTHOR_PROFILE_URL, CONCAT('/images/', pi.SERVER_NAME) AS IMAGE_URL, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM LIKES l WHERE l.REF_NO = mp.PRODUCT_ID AND l.REF_TYPE = 'MARKET' AND l.LIKE_STATUS = 'Y') AS LIKES FROM MARKETPLACE mp JOIN USERS u ON mp.USER_NO = u.USER_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE ui ON u.IMAGE_NO = ui.IMAGE_NO LEFT JOIN IMAGE pi ON mp.IMAGE_NO = pi.IMAGE_NO WHERE mp.PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
SELECT USER_NO FROM MARKETPLACE WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
SELECT SERVER_NAME FROM IMAGE WHERE IMAGE_NO = #{imageNo}
SELECT QUANTITY FROM MARKETPLACE WHERE PRODUCT_ID = #{productId}
